caption: A man wearing a green baseball cap, black headphones, and a dark green t-shirt is speaking into a professional microphone in a studio setting. His t-shirt features the text "YON NEVE DO SHIT" in white capital letters. In the background, a white mannequin is dressed in a white shirt, and several framed photographs are displayed on a light-colored wall. To the right, clothing racks filled with apparel are visible. Two logos appear on the screen: one on the left side and another on the right, which reads "REALLY TOY". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, facing slightly to the left of the camera, and continues talking with subtle changes in his facial expression and head position. The camera remains stationary, capturing him from the chest up as he engages in conversation.
